executiveSummary: Authenticated consumer upload-to-results and packet PDF retrieval are proven on live staging for the audited runtime commit. The audit remains LIMITED, not READY, because deployed browser UI and full live admin role workflows were not exhaustively automated in this pass.

authenticatedUploadResults.cleanup: owner and non-owner synthetic users deleted

authenticatedPacketPdf.cleanup: owner and non-owner synthetic users deleted

functionResults.entryPoint: HTTPS staging app shell and static routes
functionResults.expectedBehavior: App is reachable and serves the web shell without authentication.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: HTTP response reaches the client.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Both live staging smokes and certification reached staging and completed authenticated flows.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Keep deploy health probes and exact SHA evidence.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Synthetic user registers, logs in, and carries the same authenticated session through protected endpoints.
functionResults.requiredPersistenceSideEffects: users, password, account, subscription, session and audit rows.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Protected API calls accept the same session cookie.
functionResults.newAuditTestOrCommandUsed: pnpm run smoke:auth-workflow; pnpm run smoke:auth-workflow:packet
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Live synthetic users 156, 158, 160, and 162 authenticated and were cleaned up.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Keep non-secret session continuity in smoke output.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Accept generated synthetic credit bureau PDF and create a report artifact under the authenticated owner.
functionResults.requiredPersistenceSideEffects: reportArtifact row, stored file reference, digest metadata.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: artifactId is returned and usable by the owner.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Artifact 494 was owned by user 156; artifact 495 was owned by user 158.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Keep owner equality assertion mandatory.

functionResults.functionName: Credit report artifact creation and ownership
functionResults.expectedBehavior: Artifact owner matches session user and digest/storage metadata exists.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Owner can retrieve and process; non-owner cannot retrieve downstream results.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: sha256Present true for artifacts 494 and 495; owner IDs matched session users.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Record storage reference in future smoke evidence.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Validate artifact ownership, enqueue durable worker-backed processing, and return observable status.
functionResults.requiredPersistenceSideEffects: ingest_processing_job rows and artifact processing status updates.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Queued, processing, completed, failed, stale, and no-worker states are visible.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Jobs 35, 36, 38, and 39 reached terminal completed/succeeded.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Keep terminal polling and fail loudly on queued forever.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Worker claims queued jobs, heartbeats, completes, retries, or dead-letters with visible status.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: User/admin status surfaces expose worker state.
functionResults.newAuditTestOrCommandUsed: pnpm run ingest:worker:simulated-proof plus live jobs in auth smokes
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Live jobs completed; synthetic simulated proof drained 2 succeeded and 1 dead-lettered.
functionResults.failureMode: Standalone live dashboard liveness was not separately captured.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Add live read-only queue liveness snapshot to evidence.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Canonical output is deterministic and persisted for downstream retrieval.
functionResults.requiredPersistenceSideEffects: canonical/replay payload fields and persisted tradeline state.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Upload-results and packet flows reflect canonical tradelines.
functionResults.newAuditTestOrCommandUsed: pnpm run test:golden-path; pnpm run test:deterministic-ingestion-report; live auth smokes
functionResults.evidenceCollected: 11 deterministic fixtures passed; live staging uploaded report produced 2 tradelines.
functionResults.failureMode: Live smoke does not expose full canonical field payload.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Add compact canonical field snapshot to staging auth smoke.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Parser rules are regression-gated before activation and parser test cases persist safely.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Admin parser pages can inspect cases, runs, and provenance.
functionResults.newAuditTestOrCommandUsed: included in pnpm run check unit suite, static route inventory
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Unit suite passed in certification; no live admin parser promotion was attempted.
functionResults.failureMode: No deployed admin parser-test workflow proof in this audit.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Add a non-mutating synthetic admin parser-test smoke.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: No live provider call is required or allowed by certification tests.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Fallback must not silently overwrite deterministic truth.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Certification ran without live external provider calls.
functionResults.failureMode: Fallback behavior was not live-tested by design.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Keep live provider calls out of certification; add mocked fallback proof if needed.

functionResults.entryPoint: document storage and artifact storage helpers
functionResults.expectedBehavior: Artifact bytes/digest are durably available to processing and retrieval.
functionResults.requiredPersistenceSideEffects: stored file reference and artifact digest.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Processing can read artifact after upload.
functionResults.newAuditTestOrCommandUsed: live smokes plus production-scale certification storage durability gate
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Live processing read staged artifacts; storage durability gate passed in certification.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Keep storage contract as certification gate.

functionResults.entryPoint: ingest persistence helpers and upload-results endpoint
functionResults.expectedBehavior: Persist expected synthetic tradelines under the authenticated owner and artifact.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Owner upload-results shows at least 2 synthetic tradelines.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Artifacts 494, 495, 497, and 498 all produced 2 tradelines.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Do not weaken the >=2 assertion.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Scan persisted tradelines or explicitly return valid no-finding state.
functionResults.requiredPersistenceSideEffects: finding/obligation rows linked to tradelines and artifact context.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Findings or no-finding reason visible in upload-results.
functionResults.newAuditTestOrCommandUsed: live auth smokes and pnpm run test:golden-path
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Live upload-results returned 6 actionable findings; golden path violation detection passed.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Assert at least one finding rule/evidence/reference detail in smoke output.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Evidence events are append-only, owner-scoped, and hash-verifiable.
functionResults.requiredPersistenceSideEffects: evidence event rows and hash chain values.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Evidence list/attachments accessible only to authorized role.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: pnpm run test:evidence-ledger passed in certification.
functionResults.failureMode: Live uploaded finding evidence link was not separately inspected.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Add live synthetic finding evidence-link assertion.

functionResults.entryPoint: regulation registry endpoints and violation references
functionResults.expectedBehavior: Findings include explainable references without consumer-facing legal overclaiming.
functionResults.requiredPersistenceSideEffects: registry and mapping rows for admin changes.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Consumer/admin surfaces show references clearly.
functionResults.newAuditTestOrCommandUsed: golden path and unit suite through check
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Golden path regulation reference checks passed.
functionResults.failureMode: No deployed admin registry mutation proof in this audit.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Add read-only admin regulation registry smoke.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Owner retrieves results; non-owner denied; admin behavior is distinct.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Clear result or actionable terminal state.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Owner got 2 tradelines and 6 findings; second consumer got HTTP 403.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Keep same-owner and non-owner assertions in certification.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Frontend shows queued/processing/completed/failed/stale states and results without blank or indefinite 99 percent state.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: User sees clear status/result/action.
functionResults.newAuditTestOrCommandUsed: scoped Vitest UI status tests plus live API proof
functionResults.evidenceCollected: UI unit tests passed; deployed API returned terminal result data.
functionResults.failureMode: No deployed browser UI smoke was run.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Add authenticated Playwright staging UI smoke.

functionResults.functionName: Packet readiness, build, create, and PDF retrieval
functionResults.expectedBehavior: Eligible findings create owner-scoped packet and downloadable PDF; non-owner denied.
functionResults.requiredPersistenceSideEffects: packet rows and packet finding/evidence links.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: HTTP 200 application/pdf for owner; HTTP 403 for non-owner.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Finding 4946, packet 144, PDF 200 application/pdf 7307 bytes; certification packet 145, PDF 200 application/pdf 7297 bytes; non-owner 403.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Keep authenticatedPacketPdf gate mandatory.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Admin-only functions are scoped, audited, and safe for synthetic reset operations.
functionResults.requiredPersistenceSideEffects: admin audit logs and reset cascade changes for selected synthetic user.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Admin sees user/reset state and counts.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Admin reset endpoint tests passed.
functionResults.failureMode: No live staging admin role smoke.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Add safe staging admin reset smoke against synthetic user only.

functionResults.functionName: Admin violation correction and correction truth
functionResults.expectedBehavior: Corrections finalize transactionally with evidence/regulation/training/audit metadata.
functionResults.requiredPersistenceSideEffects: correction, training, audit, and reference rows.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Admin sees correction status and retryable failure state.
functionResults.newAuditTestOrCommandUsed: scoped Vitest command and pnpm run check
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Admin correction endpoint tests and violation correction regression passed.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Add synthetic correction finalization staging smoke.

functionResults.expectedBehavior: Capture, classify, process, retry/dead-letter, and expose response-document state without live provider calls.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Admin/user status and queue states visible.
functionResults.newAuditTestOrCommandUsed: scoped Vitest command; pnpm run response:soak-check
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Response document endpoint tests passed; soak observed duplicate collapse, retry, dead-letter, stale-running, replay dry-run and cleanup.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Keep no-live-mailbox/provider policy in audit gates.

functionResults.functionName: Health, deploy, rollback, and certification assumptions
functionResults.expectedBehavior: Automated gates include current target SHA, auth upload proof, packet PDF proof, and fail on stale/skipped/manual checks.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Operators can see CERTIFYING true/false and gate status.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Certification returned CERTIFYING:true with no failed/stale/skipped gates.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Continue waiting for exact SHA deploy actions after pushes.

functionResults.entryPoint: pnpm run check:migrations and pnpm run migrations:gate
functionResults.expectedBehavior: Unauthorized runtime schema ensures fail production promotion; known temporary ensures remain visible.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: Release blockers and warning-only entries are explicit.
functionResults.evidenceCollected: check:migrations exited 0 with 0 release blockers and 18 warning-only entries; certification migration governance gate passed.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Convert residual runtime ensure helpers to additive reviewed migrations.

functionResults.entryPoint: support tickets, subscriptions, leads, analytics, deadlines, bankruptcy, freezes, statutes, legal authority endpoints
functionResults.expectedBehavior: Role-scoped CRUD/list/status behavior.
functionResults.requiredRetrievalDisplayBehavior: User/admin pages show scoped records.
functionResults.newAuditTestOrCommandUsed: pnpm run production-scale:certify and pnpm run check
functionResults.evidenceCollected: Contracts, API suite, unit suite, and build passed through certification.
functionResults.recommendedNextRemediationTask: Add separate smokes only for release-critical ancillary flows.

commandsRun.summary: Branch staging...origin/staging; unrelated untracked docs/IMG_1433.jpeg was present and not staged.

commandsRun.command: git rev-parse --show-toplevel; git branch --show-current; git rev-parse HEAD; git remote -v
commandsRun.summary: Repo, branch, commit and origin remote identified.
Reviewed package scripts, server route registration, endpoint inventory, ingest, status, upload-results, packet, admin, response, and existing audit docs.
Owner 156, artifact 494, job 35 completed, 2 tradelines, 6 actionable findings, non-owner 403.
Owner 158, artifact 495, job 36 completed, selected finding 4946, packet 144, PDF 200 application/pdf 7307 bytes, non-owner PDF 403.
Upload, parse, canonical map, anomaly detect, violation detect, evidence bind, packet generate, PDF download passed.
11 fixtures passed; replay stable; required evidence coverage 100 percent; violation search preserved.
Synthetic queue depth drained from 3 queued to 2 succeeded and 1 dead-lettered; non-certifying staging queue-drain note retained.
Duplicate collapse, retry backlog, dead-letter, stale-running, replay dry-run, retention preview, drift detection and cleanup observed.
0 release blockers and 18 warning-only runtime ensure entries; standalone evidence remains CERTIFYING:false while warning entries exist.
CERTIFYING:true. Auth upload-results and authenticated packet PDF gates passed with current target SHA.

historicalFailures.summary: Authenticated upload-to-results originally returned 0 tradelines because the proof queried results before worker completion.
historicalFailures.currentEvidence: Live staging auth smoke and certification now pass with 2 tradelines, 6 actionable findings, terminal completed ingest status, and non-owner 403.

historicalFailures.summary: Live staging packet PDF previously returned HTTP 502 after upload-results succeeded because corrupt synthetic ID image data crashed PDF rendering.
historicalFailures.currentEvidence: Live packet smoke and certification now return PDF HTTP 200 application/pdf with %PDF header proof and non-owner 403.

remediationTasks.prompt: Add an authenticated Playwright staging smoke for /upload and /upload-results/:artifactId that reuses the synthetic auth workflow, verifies terminal status and rendered tradeline/finding content, and fails on blank, queued forever, 99 percent, or generic failure states.

Add a synthetic staging admin smoke that verifies admin reset-user, violation correction detail/finalization dry run, evidence list, regulation registry list, and parser-test list without mutating real user data.
Extend the live staging auth smoke to record a compact canonical field snapshot and at least one finding rule/evidence/regulation reference for the selected synthetic finding.
Continue migration governance hardening by converting the remaining warning-only runtime ensure sources into additive reviewed migrations, one helper family at a time.

unverifiedAreas.area: Deployed browser UI for upload and upload-results
unverifiedAreas.reason: The audit used live staging API/script smokes and UI unit tests, but did not run automated browser UI against staging.
Admin reset and correction endpoints were covered by tests, but a deployed synthetic admin workflow was not executed.
Forbidden by audit constraints; certification uses mocks, simulations, static checks, and deterministic fixtures only.
Forbidden by audit constraints; workflow static checks and rollback simulation are used instead.
Contracts, API suite, build, and unit tests covered broad surfaces, but not every support/subscription/analytics page was live-smoked.

previousAuditMissed: Route existence and unit success were treated as stronger evidence than an authenticated deployed user path.
The earlier proof did not wait through the real staging worker boundary before reading upload-results.
Parser success was allowed to stand in for authenticated upload-to-results success.
Local packet PDF/cache proof was allowed to stand in for live staging packet PDF retrieval before the 502 was found.
